TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tisun a nia Kama i tjarivavaw, ulja namasan tjaljaparavacan a su ngadan, ulja na mangetjez a su sipaljavakan, ulja namapasusu a su kininemeneman i kacauan, a namaya tua i tjarivavaw. a nia kanen tu qadaw anga, pagaugavi amen tucu a qadaw. nu napazekatj amen tua napasaliw tjanuamen, ulja sun a namaya auta a napazekatj tjanuamen. maya men a pasecevucevung tua sisepakilingaw. paseqeljiqeljingu amen a kemasi tua nakuya. ayatua a pinaljavakan, a picul, a ligu, nisun a penuljat a patje palalaut. amen. kai Hiljasan . Latinan Pater noster, qui es in caelis, sanctificetur nomen tuum; adveniat regnum tuum; fiat voluntas tua, sicut in caelo, et in terra. Panem nostrum cotidianum da nobis hodie; et dimitte nobis debita nostra, sicut et nos dimittimus debitoribus nostris; et ne nos inducas in tentationem; sed libera nos a malo. (Quoniam tibi est regnum et potestas et gloria in saecula.) Amen. Inamilikan Our Father, who art in heaven, Hallowed be thy Name. Thy Kingdom come. Thy will be done on earth, As it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread. And forgive us our trespasses , As we forgive them that trespass against us . And lead us not into temptation, But deliver us from evil. For thine is the kingdom, The power, and the glory, For ever and ever. Amen. kinacalisianan Amis"Fangcalay Cudad" Wama niyam I kakarayan, Nanay mapahmek ko Nika fangcal no ngangan iso. pataynien ko nikowanan iso a kitakit. paiahcien ko nafaloco'an iso itini i kala'no, matiya ono i kakarayananay. Paflien kami to no aniniay a saka'orip niyam. Hpolen ko raraw niyam, matiya o nipihpol niyam to pararaway i tamiyanan. Kriden kami to sakacaaw ka sawi niyam. Pa'oripen kami a paliyas nai tatiihay, Nawhani, omikowanay , o ci'icelay, o ci'dilay kiso a mida'oc. Amin. Drekai"Baavan Ka Sakiketeketan Ka'siisiw" Bulru ki yesusama kasaki tubitubiane kitwaumase Kusu ka Tama nay ka yasubelebeleng pawsakesakenanga nai yane makanaelre musuane Lakamanianga Kawaerece ki kai yakawmasane pangimiaanga ki kidremedremesu kikai yakawmasane mia ka subelebeleng lapatarumaramara nai yane kulrikatalekenai kainakameanenga luikaiku pasalriw naiyane lapacepe nai i mialrisu paceacepe ki pasalivane nay Madha pakipadradreseng kwa kikituthiathingalane nay Palakelakeba nai yane kiaidridringane A lakay erecesu kay puku kay akaesadhane waelrelresu palralrauthu Amin Tau"Seysyo No Tao" Mo Ama do to: inaoy nosi mamimin o tao a zomwazway so Meylimawang a ngaran mo, Inaoy no italamozong mo okarawan, Inaoy no mai jyamen do teyrahem o apiya ahahapan mo sya do teyngato, o kanen namen sicyaraw eya am itoro mo jyamen,vonasen mo o raraten namen, akman jyamen a ji mapeyyan sya do onowned so raten da jyamen no icyatatao namen, Ji mo yamen amya kalitan. Apzatan mo yamen mo Ama do to, do kararatan do teyrahem Ta imo rana am kateymoyat a tey mazway a Tao do to yatomalamozong nyamen a mangay do kaidan no karawan, A min. Kabalan"Qnanngi ay Sudad ¬∑ Tmunux tu Tama" Tamakita taddanan. Wanay qxasanna ya qnanngi na nangansu. Paqawtuika qizuanansu tu qnabanang. Xassiaka qnasianemsu tazian talibeng azu taddanan. Bulaita stangiay ya saqabinnuskita. Sululika qnalisawkita, azu smululkita tu palisaway timaymian. Kawitita tu mai qaytiskita ta msukawan zau nani. Qnaxu qizuananay, qsexay, qmidatay, aisu tuzus tu qaxzannan. Amin Hiberaian ' .' pacunu uta Kai nua Cemas
S.PHON: tisun a nia kama i ¶arivavaw, u éa namasan ¶a éaparava ¶an a su Ňčadan, u éa na maŇč…ô ¶…ôz a su sipa éavakan, u éa namapasusu a su kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman i ka ¶auan, a namaja tua i ¶arivavaw. a nia kan…ôn tu qadaw aŇča, pagaugavi am…ôn tu ¶u a qadaw. nu napaz…ôka ¶ am…ôn tua napasa…≠iw ¶anuam…ôn, u éa sun a namaja auta a napaz…ôka ¶ ¶anuam…ôn. maja m…ôn a pas…ô ¶…ôvu ¶…ôvuŇč tua sis…ôpaki…≠iŇčaw. pas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇču am…ôn a k…ômasi tua nakuja. ajatua a pina éavakan, a pi ¶u…≠, a …≠igu, nisun a p…ônu éat a pa ¶…ô pa…≠a…≠aut. am…ôn. kai hi éasan . …≠atinan pat…ôr nust…ôr, qui …ôs in ¶a…ô…≠is, san ¶ti*i ¶…ôtur num…ôn tuum; adv…ôniat r…ôgnum tuum; *iat vu…≠untas tua, si ¶ut in ¶a…ô…≠u, …ôt in t…ôrra. pan…ôm nustrum ¶utidianum da nubis hudi…ô; …ôt dimitt…ô nubis d…ôbita nustra, si ¶ut …ôt nus dimittimus d…ôbituribus nustris; …ôt n…ô nus indu ¶as in t…ôntatiun…ôm; s…ôd …≠ib…ôra nus a ma…≠u. (quuniam tibi …ôst r…ôgnum …ôt put…ôstas …ôt g…≠uria in sa…ô ¶u…≠a.) am…ôn. inami…≠ikan uur *ath…ôr, whu art in h…ôav…ôn, ha…≠…≠uw…ôd b…ô thj nam…ô. thj kiŇčdum ¶um…ô. thj wi…≠…≠ b…ô dun…ô un …ôarth, as it is in h…ôav…ôn. giv…ô us this daj uur dai…≠j br…ôad. and *urgiv…ô us uur tr…ôspass…ôs , as w…ô *urgiv…ô th…ôm that tr…ôspass against us . and …≠…ôad us nut intu t…ômptatiun, but d…ô…≠iv…ôr us *rum …ôvi…≠. *ur thin…ô is th…ô kiŇčdum, th…ô puw…ôr, and th…ô g…≠urj, *ur …ôv…ôr and …ôv…ôr. am…ôn. kina ¶a…≠isianan amis"*aŇč ¶a…≠aj ¶udad" wama nijam i kakarajan, nanaj mapahm…ôk ku nika *aŇč ¶a…≠ nu ŇčaŇčan isu. patajni…ôn ku nikuwanan isu a kitakit. paiah ¶i…ôn ku na*a…≠u ¶u Ēan isu itini i ka…≠a Ēnu, matija unu i kakarajananaj. pa*…≠i…ôn kami tu nu aniniaj a saka Ēurip nijam. hpu…≠…ôn ku raraw nijam, matija u nipihpu…≠ nijam tu pararawaj i tamijanan. krid…ôn kami tu saka ¶aaw ka sawi nijam. pa Ēurip…ôn kami a pa…≠ijas nai tatiihaj, nawhani, umikuwanaj , u ¶i Ēi ¶…ô…≠aj, u ¶i Ēdi…≠aj kisu a mida Ēu ¶. amin. …Ė…ôkai"baavan ka sakik…ôt…ôk…ôtan ka Ēsiisiw" bu…≠ru ki j…ôsusama kasaki tubitubian…ô kitwaumas…ô kusu ka tama naj ka jasub…ô…≠…ôb…ô…≠…ôŇč pawsak…ôsak…ônaŇča nai jan…ô makana…ô…≠r…ô musuan…ô …≠akamaniaŇča kawa…ôr…ô ¶…ô ki kai jakawmasan…ô paŇčimiaaŇča ki ki…Ė…ôm…ô…Ė…ôm…ôsu kikai jakawmasan…ô mia ka sub…ô…≠…ôb…ô…≠…ôŇč …≠apatarumaramara nai jan…ô ku…≠rikata…≠…ôk…ônai kainakam…ôan…ôŇča …≠uikaiku pasa…≠riw naijan…ô …≠apa ¶…ôp…ô nai i mia…≠risu pa ¶…ôa ¶…ôp…ô ki pasa…≠ivan…ô naj madha pakipa…Ėa…Ė…ôs…ôŇč kwa kikituthiathiŇča…≠an…ô naj pa…≠ak…ô…≠ak…ôba nai jan…ô kiai…Ėi…ĖiŇčan…ô a …≠akaj …ôr…ô ¶…ôsu kaj puku kaj aka…ôsadhan…ô wa…ô…≠r…ô…≠r…ôsu pa…≠ra…≠rauthu amin tau"s…ôjsju nu tau" mu ama du tu: inauj nusi mamimin u tau a zumwazwaj su m…ôj…≠imawaŇč a Ňčaran mu, inauj nu ita…≠amuzuŇč mu ukarawan, inauj nu mai jjam…ôn du t…ôjrah…ôm u apija ahahapan mu sja du t…ôjŇčatu, u kan…ôn nam…ôn si ¶jaraw …ôja am ituru mu jjam…ôn,vunas…ôn mu u rarat…ôn nam…ôn, akman jjam…ôn a ji map…ôjjan sja du unuwn…ôd su rat…ôn da jjam…ôn nu i ¶jatatau nam…ôn, *i mu jam…ôn amja ka…≠itan. apzatan mu jam…ôn mu ama du tu, du kararatan du t…ôjrah…ôm ta imu rana am kat…ôjmujat a t…ôj mazwaj a tau du tu jatuma…≠amuzuŇč njam…ôn a maŇčaj du kaidan nu karawan, a min. kaba…≠an"qnanŇči aj sudad * tmunu* tu tama" tamakita taddanan. wanaj q*asanna ja qnanŇči na naŇčansu. paqawtuika qizuanansu tu qnabanaŇč. *assiaka qnasian…ômsu tazian ta…≠ib…ôŇč azu taddanan. bu…≠aita staŇčiaj ja saqabinnuskita. su…≠u…≠ika qna…≠isawkita, azu smu…≠u…≠kita tu pa…≠isawaj timajmian. kawitita tu mai qajtiskita ta msukawan zau nani. qna*u qizuananaj, qs…ô*aj, qmidataj, aisu tuzus tu qa*zannan. amin hib…ôraian Ē . Ē pa ¶unu uta kai nua ¶…ômas
S.FORM: tisun a nia Kama i tjarivavaw, ulja namasan tjaljaparavacan a su ngadan, ulja na mangetjez a su sipaljavakan, ulja namapasusu a su kininemeneman i kacauan, a namaya tua i tjarivavaw. a nia kanen tu qadaw anga, pagaugavi amen tucu a qadaw. nu napazekatj amen tua napasaliw tjanuamen, ulja sun a namaya auta a napazekatj tjanuamen. maya men a pasecevucevung tua sisepakilingaw. paseqeljiqeljingu amen a kemasi tua nakuya. ayatua a pinaljavakan, a picul, a ligu, nisun a penuljat a patje palalaut. amen. kai Hiljasan . Latinan Pater noster, qui es in caelis, sanctificetur nomen tuum; adveniat regnum tuum; fiat voluntas tua, sicut in caelo, et in terra. Panem nostrum cotidianum da nobis hodie; et dimitte nobis debita nostra, sicut et nos dimittimus debitoribus nostris; et ne nos inducas in tentationem; sed libera nos a malo. (Quoniam tibi est regnum et potestas et gloria in saecula.) Amen. Inamilikan Our Father, who art in heaven, Hallowed be thy Name. Thy Kingdom come. Thy will be done on earth, As it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread. And forgive us our trespasses , As we forgive them that trespass against us . And lead us not into temptation, But deliver us from evil. For thine is the kingdom, The power, and the glory, For ever and ever. Amen. kinacalisianan Amis"Fangcalay Cudad" Wama niyam I kakarayan, Nanay mapahmek ko Nika fangcal no ngangan iso. pataynien ko nikowanan iso a kitakit. paiahcien ko nafaloco'an iso itini i kala'no, matiya ono i kakarayananay. Paflien kami to no aniniay a saka'orip niyam. Hpolen ko raraw niyam, matiya o nipihpol niyam to pararaway i tamiyanan. Kriden kami to sakacaaw ka sawi niyam. Pa'oripen kami a paliyas nai tatiihay, Nawhani, omikowanay , o ci'icelay, o ci'dilay kiso a mida'oc. Amin. Drekai"Baavan Ka Sakiketeketan Ka'siisiw" Bulru ki yesusama kasaki tubitubiane kitwaumase Kusu ka Tama nay ka yasubelebeleng pawsakesakenanga nai yane makanaelre musuane Lakamanianga Kawaerece ki kai yakawmasane pangimiaanga ki kidremedremesu kikai yakawmasane mia ka subelebeleng lapatarumaramara nai yane kulrikatalekenai kainakameanenga luikaiku pasalriw naiyane lapacepe nai i mialrisu paceacepe ki pasalivane nay Madha pakipadradreseng kwa kikituthiathingalane nay Palakelakeba nai yane kiaidridringane A lakay erecesu kay puku kay akaesadhane waelrelresu palralrauthu Amin Tau"Seysyo No Tao" Mo Ama do to: inaoy nosi mamimin o tao a zomwazway so Meylimawang a ngaran mo, Inaoy no italamozong mo okarawan, Inaoy no mai jyamen do teyrahem o apiya ahahapan mo sya do teyngato, o kanen namen sicyaraw eya am itoro mo jyamen,vonasen mo o raraten namen, akman jyamen a ji mapeyyan sya do onowned so raten da jyamen no icyatatao namen, Ji mo yamen amya kalitan. Apzatan mo yamen mo Ama do to, do kararatan do teyrahem Ta imo rana am kateymoyat a tey mazway a Tao do to yatomalamozong nyamen a mangay do kaidan no karawan, A min. Kabalan"Qnanngi ay Sudad ¬∑ Tmunux tu Tama" Tamakita taddanan. Wanay qxasanna ya qnanngi na nangansu. Paqawtuika qizuanansu tu qnabanang. Xassiaka qnasianemsu tazian talibeng azu taddanan. Bulaita stangiay ya saqabinnuskita. Sululika qnalisawkita, azu smululkita tu palisaway timaymian. Kawitita tu mai qaytiskita ta msukawan zau nani. Qnaxu qizuananay, qsexay, qmidatay, aisu tuzus tu qaxzannan. Amin Hiberaian ' .' pacunu uta Kai nua Cemas
S.PHON: tisun a nia kama i ¶arivavaw, u éa namasan ¶a éaparava ¶an a su Ňčadan, u éa na maŇč…ô ¶…ôz a su sipa éavakan, u éa namapasusu a su kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman i ka ¶auan, a namaja tua i ¶arivavaw. a nia kan…ôn tu qadaw aŇča, pagaugavi am…ôn tu ¶u a qadaw. nu napaz…ôka ¶ am…ôn tua napasa…≠iw ¶anuam…ôn, u éa sun a namaja auta a napaz…ôka ¶ ¶anuam…ôn. maja m…ôn a pas…ô ¶…ôvu ¶…ôvuŇč tua sis…ôpaki…≠iŇčaw. pas…ôq…ô éiq…ô éiŇču am…ôn a k…ômasi tua nakuja. ajatua a pina éavakan, a pi ¶u…≠, a …≠igu, nisun a p…ônu éat a pa ¶…ô pa…≠a…≠aut. am…ôn. kai hi éasan . …≠atinan pat…ôr nust…ôr, qui …ôs in ¶a…ô…≠is, san ¶ti*i ¶…ôtur num…ôn tuum; adv…ôniat r…ôgnum tuum; *iat vu…≠untas tua, si ¶ut in ¶a…ô…≠u, …ôt in t…ôrra. pan…ôm nustrum ¶utidianum da nubis hudi…ô; …ôt dimitt…ô nubis d…ôbita nustra, si ¶ut …ôt nus dimittimus d…ôbituribus nustris; …ôt n…ô nus indu ¶as in t…ôntatiun…ôm; s…ôd …≠ib…ôra nus a ma…≠u. (quuniam tibi …ôst r…ôgnum …ôt put…ôstas …ôt g…≠uria in sa…ô ¶u…≠a.) am…ôn. inami…≠ikan uur *ath…ôr, whu art in h…ôav…ôn, ha…≠…≠uw…ôd b…ô thj nam…ô. thj kiŇčdum ¶um…ô. thj wi…≠…≠ b…ô dun…ô un …ôarth, as it is in h…ôav…ôn. giv…ô us this daj uur dai…≠j br…ôad. and *urgiv…ô us uur tr…ôspass…ôs , as w…ô *urgiv…ô th…ôm that tr…ôspass against us . and …≠…ôad us nut intu t…ômptatiun, but d…ô…≠iv…ôr us *rum …ôvi…≠. *ur thin…ô is th…ô kiŇčdum, th…ô puw…ôr, and th…ô g…≠urj, *ur …ôv…ôr and …ôv…ôr. am…ôn. kina ¶a…≠isianan amis"*aŇč ¶a…≠aj ¶udad" wama nijam i kakarajan, nanaj mapahm…ôk ku nika *aŇč ¶a…≠ nu ŇčaŇčan isu. patajni…ôn ku nikuwanan isu a kitakit. paiah ¶i…ôn ku na*a…≠u ¶u Ēan isu itini i ka…≠a Ēnu, matija unu i kakarajananaj. pa*…≠i…ôn kami tu nu aniniaj a saka Ēurip nijam. hpu…≠…ôn ku raraw nijam, matija u nipihpu…≠ nijam tu pararawaj i tamijanan. krid…ôn kami tu saka ¶aaw ka sawi nijam. pa Ēurip…ôn kami a pa…≠ijas nai tatiihaj, nawhani, umikuwanaj , u ¶i Ēi ¶…ô…≠aj, u ¶i Ēdi…≠aj kisu a mida Ēu ¶. amin. …Ė…ôkai"baavan ka sakik…ôt…ôk…ôtan ka Ēsiisiw" bu…≠ru ki j…ôsusama kasaki tubitubian…ô kitwaumas…ô kusu ka tama naj ka jasub…ô…≠…ôb…ô…≠…ôŇč pawsak…ôsak…ônaŇča nai jan…ô makana…ô…≠r…ô musuan…ô …≠akamaniaŇča kawa…ôr…ô ¶…ô ki kai jakawmasan…ô paŇčimiaaŇča ki ki…Ė…ôm…ô…Ė…ôm…ôsu kikai jakawmasan…ô mia ka sub…ô…≠…ôb…ô…≠…ôŇč …≠apatarumaramara nai jan…ô ku…≠rikata…≠…ôk…ônai kainakam…ôan…ôŇča …≠uikaiku pasa…≠riw naijan…ô …≠apa ¶…ôp…ô nai i mia…≠risu pa ¶…ôa ¶…ôp…ô ki pasa…≠ivan…ô naj madha pakipa…Ėa…Ė…ôs…ôŇč kwa kikituthiathiŇča…≠an…ô naj pa…≠ak…ô…≠ak…ôba nai jan…ô kiai…Ėi…ĖiŇčan…ô a …≠akaj …ôr…ô ¶…ôsu kaj puku kaj aka…ôsadhan…ô wa…ô…≠r…ô…≠r…ôsu pa…≠ra…≠rauthu amin tau"s…ôjsju nu tau" mu ama du tu: inauj nusi mamimin u tau a zumwazwaj su m…ôj…≠imawaŇč a Ňčaran mu, inauj nu ita…≠amuzuŇč mu ukarawan, inauj nu mai jjam…ôn du t…ôjrah…ôm u apija ahahapan mu sja du t…ôjŇčatu, u kan…ôn nam…ôn si ¶jaraw …ôja am ituru mu jjam…ôn,vunas…ôn mu u rarat…ôn nam…ôn, akman jjam…ôn a ji map…ôjjan sja du unuwn…ôd su rat…ôn da jjam…ôn nu i ¶jatatau nam…ôn, *i mu jam…ôn amja ka…≠itan. apzatan mu jam…ôn mu ama du tu, du kararatan du t…ôjrah…ôm ta imu rana am kat…ôjmujat a t…ôj mazwaj a tau du tu jatuma…≠amuzuŇč njam…ôn a maŇčaj du kaidan nu karawan, a min. kaba…≠an"qnanŇči aj sudad * tmunu* tu tama" tamakita taddanan. wanaj q*asanna ja qnanŇči na naŇčansu. paqawtuika qizuanansu tu qnabanaŇč. *assiaka qnasian…ômsu tazian ta…≠ib…ôŇč azu taddanan. bu…≠aita staŇčiaj ja saqabinnuskita. su…≠u…≠ika qna…≠isawkita, azu smu…≠u…≠kita tu pa…≠isawaj timajmian. kawitita tu mai qajtiskita ta msukawan zau nani. qna*u qizuananaj, qs…ô*aj, qmidataj, aisu tuzus tu qa*zannan. amin hib…ôraian Ē . Ē pa ¶unu uta kai nua ¶…ômas
